chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D- 1464 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA NO.5829/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of CMA No.5830/2024 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 23-10-2025 Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the Petitioner submits that a Representation under Regulation 161 of the Sindh Public Service Commission (Recruitment Management) Regulations, 2023 was preferred by the Petitioner, which was declined by the Respondents / Competent Authority. Learned Counsel further contends that, due to the pendency of the present Petition, the Petitioner could not prefer an Appeal against the said order, and as such, the same has now become time-barred. He, therefore, submits that the Petitioner may be allowed to file an Appeal against the order passed by the Single Member Bench before the Two Member Bench. Learned Additional AG, while opposing the claim of the Petitioner on the ground of lack of requisite experience, however, fairly concedes to the condonation of delay in filing the Appeal before the Two Member Bench. In view of the above, this Petition is disposed of along with listed applications, while condoning the delay in filing the Appeal against the order of the Single Member Bench. The Petitioner is allowed to file such Appeal before the Two Member Bench within fifteen days from the date of this order. Judge Judge ARBROHI
